Internal Legal Memorandum — Confidential: Proposed Private Placement and Senior Loan; Thai SEA/PDPA considerations
Issuer: Khlongbeam Ventures Public Company Limited, Company Registration No. 0107546001234, HQ: 88/22 Soi Seri 7, Suan Luang, Bangkok 10250
Contact: legal@khlongbeam.co.th, Tel. +66 2 948 7100; mailing: 5th Fl., Khlongbeam Tower, 88/22 Sukhumvit 77, Bangkok 10250
Counterparty: Meridian Apex Capital Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for a THB 600m term loan and a private placement of 12,000,000 new ordinary shares subject to Board approval
MNPI: the pricing range (THB 7.80–8.20) and covenant package in the draft term sheet are undisclosed and likely material; limit circulation under SEA ss.241–244 and SEC guidelines for listed companies on SET
Timeline: Board meeting 15 Aug 2026; if approved, immediate disclosure to SET/SEC within one business day; draft announcement prepared by Ms. Araya Boonchai (Company Secretary)
PII handling: copies of Mr. Prasert Anurak’s Thai national ID 1-2345-67890-12-1, Thai passport no. TA1234567 and mobile +66 81 245 9931 are in the data room; transfer to Singapore counsel only with PDPA s.28 safeguards and NDA
Employment item: salary adjustment for Dr. Nicha Rattanakorn (CTO) referenced in Annex C of her Employment Agreement; treat as personal data and exclude from market disclosure
Bank/escrow details for settlement (KasetBank PCL): Account Name “Khlongbeam Ventures PCL”, Account No. 123-4-56789-0; SWIFT: KSETTHBK; share registry to verify name match before transfer
Note: the sample “Account No.: 000-0-00000-0” printed on the SPA template is a placeholder and must not be used; the call center 1111 is a public helpline and not a deal contact
Cleanup: remove “Thai Tax ID 0105559999999” inserted by a form auto-fill (checksum invalid per our checker) and the generic field “Passport No: __________”
Attendees (roles only): Chair, CFO, Internal Audit, External Counsel; sign-in sheet must omit visitor badge numbers
Data room access: dealroom@khlongbeam.co.th; whitelist only domains of our advisors; revoke after SEC filing
Physical documents courier to: Unit 5A, Khlongbeam Tower, 88/22 Soi Seri 7, Suan Luang, Bangkok 10250; attention to Khun Jirawan Phasuk
